paper_metadata.title: Gemini: A Family of Highly Capable Multimodal Models
paper_metadata.abstract: This report introduces a new family of multimodal models, Gemini, that exhibit remarkable capabilities across image, audio, video, and text understanding. The Gemini family consists of Ultra, Pro, and Nano sizes, suitable for applications ranging from complex reasoning tasks to on-device memory-constrained use-cases. Evaluation on a broad range of benchmarks shows that our most-capable Gemini Ultra model advances the state of the art in 30 of 32 of these benchmarks - notably being the first model to achieve human-expert performance on the well-studied exam benchmark MMLU, and improving the state of the art in every one of the 20 multimodal benchmarks we examined. We believe that the new capabilities of the Gemini family in cross-modal reasoning and language understanding will enable a wide variety of use cases. We discuss our approach toward post-training and deploying Gemini models responsibly to users through services including Gemini, Gemini Advanced, Google AI Studio, and Cloud Vertex AI.

extraction_data.innovation: Gemini models are multimodal models trained jointly on image, audio, video, and text data to achieve state-of-the-art performance in multimodal reasoning and understanding. They use a Transformer decoder architecture with multi-query attention and are optimized for 32k context length.
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: Large-scale multimodal dataset (image, audio, video, text)
extraction_data.application: Multimodal reasoning, multimodal question answering, educational applications, coding, and general AI tasks.
extraction_data.research_problem: Multimodal reasoning and understanding across text, image, audio, and video.
extraction_data.extension: Efficient multi-query attention and multimodal training with image, audio, and video inputs
extraction_data.paper_title: Gemini: A Family of Highly Capable Multimodal Models

extraction_data.innovation: Gemini Pro is a smaller variant of Gemini Ultra, optimized for enhanced performance and deployability at scale. It retains multimodal capabilities but with reduced parameters for efficient inference.
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: Multimodal dataset (web documents, books, code, images, audio, video)
extraction_data.hardware_used: Google Cloud TPUv4 (as mentioned in the paper for training)
extraction_data.extension: Scalable multimodal architecture with reduced parameters while maintaining performance.
extraction_data.research_problem: Efficient multimodal reasoning and understanding with reduced computational requirements.
extraction_data.application: Multimodal reasoning, multimodal question answering, on-device applications, and general AI tasks.
extraction_data.paper_title: Gemini: A Family of Highly Capable Multimodal Models

extraction_data.innovation: Gemini Pro 1.0 is a multimodal model trained to process text, vision, and audio inputs, with post-training focused on instruction following, safety, and factuality.
extraction_data.pretraining_task: Multimodal (text, image, audio, video) with multi-query attention
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: Web documents, books, code, image, audio, and video data
extraction_data.extension: Efficient multi-query attention and multimodal training with image, audio, and video inputs
extraction_data.application: Multimodal tasks including reasoning, image and text generation, audio understanding, and video understanding
extraction_data.paper_title: Gemini: A Family of Highly Capable Multimodal Models

extraction_data.innovation: Efficient multimodal model for on-device use, trained via distillation from larger models
extraction_data.pretraining_task: Multimodal (text, image, audio, video) with multi-query attention
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: Web documents, books, code, image, audio, and video data
extraction_data.research_problem: On-device multimodal language understanding and generation
extraction_data.application: On-device applications requiring multimodal understanding and generation
extraction_data.paper_title: Gemini: A Family of Highly Capable Multimodal Models

extraction_data.innovation: A specialized version of Gemini Pro fine-tuned for competitive programming tasks, combining multimodal capabilities with search and reasoning to solve complex problems. It achieves 43% accuracy on Codeforces, outperforming prior systems.
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: Large-scale multimodal dataset (text, images, videos, audio)
extraction_data.parameters: Tuned version of Gemini Pro (160B or similar)
extraction_data.paper_title: Gemini: A Family of Highly Capable Multimodal Models

extraction_data.innovation: Gemini Nano is a smaller, efficient variant of Gemini, designed for edge devices. It demonstrates multimodal capabilities in speech recognition and image generation, showing the model's scalability across sizes.
extraction_data.application: Multimodal tasks including speech recognition and image generation.
extraction_data.research_problem: Multimodal understanding and reasoning across text, images, and audio.
extraction_data.hardware_used: Google Cloud TPUv4 (as mentioned in the paper for training)
extraction_data.extension: Efficient multimodal model for edge devices with reduced parameters.
extraction_data.paper_title: Gemini: A Family of Highly Capable Multimodal Models

extraction_data.innovation: Gemini Advanced 1.0 extends Gemini Pro 1.0 with enhanced multimodal capabilities and improved safety and factuality through post-training.
extraction_data.application: Multimodal conversational AI, multimodal reasoning, instruction following
extraction_data.paper_title: Gemini: A Family of Highly Capable Multimodal Models

extraction_data.innovation: Gemini Pro 1.5 is an updated version of Pro 1.0 with refinements in multimodal reasoning and safety.
extraction_data.application: Multimodal conversational AI, multimodal reasoning, instruction following
extraction_data.paper_title: Gemini: A Family of Highly Capable Multimodal Models

extraction_data.innovation: Gemini API provides a developer-focused interface for integrating multimodal models into applications, with post-training for instruction following and safety.
extraction_data.application: Multimodal conversational AI, multimodal reasoning, instruction following
extraction_data.paper_title: Gemini: A Family of Highly Capable Multimodal Models

extraction_data.innovation: Multimodal models trained on diverse data to enable cross-modal understanding and generation, with safety-focused post-training to mitigate harmful outputs.
extraction_data.finetuning_task: Supervised fine-tuning with safety-focused objectives (e.g., avoiding harmful responses)
extraction_data.extension: Safety-focused post-training using supervised fine-tuning and reinforcement learning with human feedback to reduce harmful outputs (e.g., hate speech, dangerous advice).
extraction_data.research_problem: Large-scale multimodal language models with safety and responsible use
extraction_data.application: Multimodal tasks like text-to-image generation, text-to-video, and multimodal understanding
extraction_data.paper_title: Gemini: A Family of Highly Capable Multimodal Models
